name: @xpert-ai/plugin-pencil
description: Pencil Agentic App plugin for design documents, reviewable versions, imports, exports, and an editable Workbench.
author: XpertAI

interface.longDescription: Create, inspect, edit, version, import, and export Pencil design documents with an Assistant and Workbench.
defaultPrompt: Create a new Pencil design document for this product screen.
Create a realistic Pencil sample dashboard with complex auto-layout.
Import this .fig file into Pencil and summarize the pages.
Export the current Pencil document as SVG.

contents.name: pencil-agent-skill
contents.description: Skill for Pencil middleware tools, Workbench context, design graph edits, imports, exports, and recovery.

contents.name: pencil-assistant
contents.description: Assistant template for Pencil design workflows.

contents.name: pencil
contents.description: Use Pencil Assistant with Workbench and Agent middleware tools for design documents.

contents.name: pencil_workbench
contents.description: Workbench view for Pencil document editing, versions, imports, exports, and logs.

contents.name: PencilMiddleware
contents.description: Assistant middleware tools for Pencil documents, design nodes, imports, exports, and failure reporting.
